audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated via calloc() at line 305 is not freed when mutex_trylock fails at line 310, causing the function to return NULL without cleanup in the else block (lines 312-314). Proof failed: no free(iter) call exists in the failure path.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Any caller invoking assoc_get_iterator() while maintenance_lock is held will trigger mutex_trylock failure, causing memory leak of sizeof(struct assoc_iterator) bytes per failed call.
